audit/audit_and_validation.because: the audit validates recorded step conclusions
the audit checks claims against gathered citations

audit/pre_submission_checklist.because: the pre-submission checklist reviews a written paper
the checklist builds on the prior quality audit's report

guidance/analysis_plan.because: the analysis plan builds each step on recorded methods
each step grounds its choices in the gathered literature

guidance/peer_review_response.because: a response addresses comments on a written paper

guidance/revise_and_resubmit.because: a revision rewrites the submitted manuscript

guidance/roadmap_execution.because: the autonomous build loop executes against a durable roadmap

methodology/meta_analysis.because: a meta-analysis pools effect sizes from the extraction table

methodology/preregistration.because: a preregistration freezes the methods that must already exist

methodology/qualitative_pii_redaction.because: there must be raw data to redact
redaction follows a declared PII policy

synthesis/reviewer_response.because: a reviewer response addresses comments on a written paper
responses cite the study's recorded findings

synthesis/synthesis_paper.because: the paper's methods section builds on recorded methods
the paper grounds claims in gathered citations
the paper reports findings from completed steps

writing/writing_results.because: the results section writes up recorded step findings
